nl_query: Which scripts have a mismatch between the number of pages recorded in scan metadata and the number of script_page rows stored in the database?
failed_sql: SELECT a.id, a.urn, a.scan_metadata->>'page_count' AS recorded_pages, COUNT(sp.id) AS script_page_count FROM answer_script a JOIN script_page sp ON a.id = sp.script_id GROUP BY a.id, a.urn HAVING recorded_pages != script_page_count ORDER BY recorded_pages - script_page_count DESC LIMIT 100;
